AIDefendPositionBehavior.name: AIDefendPositionBehavior
AIDefendPositionBehavior.title: AIDefendPositionBehavior
AIDefendPositionBehavior.summary_raw: Sets a **%{PYRITE_TYPE_PLAYER}** to defend an area around a location. (Only works for AI players)
AIDefendPositionBehavior.summary_known_placeholders_resolved: Sets a **Player** to defend an area around a location. (Only works for AI players)
examples_xml:
<block type="AIDefendPositionBehavior">
    <value name="VALUE-0">
        <block type="EventPlayer"></block>
    </value>
    <value name="VALUE-1">
        <block type="CreateVector">
            <value name="VALUE-0">
                <block type="Number">
                    <field name="NUM">88</field>
                </block>
            </value>
            <value name="VALUE-1">
                <block type="Number">
                    <field name="NUM">45</field>
                </block>
            </value>
            <value name="VALUE-2">
                <block type="Number">
                    <field name="NUM">-30</field>
                </block>
            </value>
        </block>
    </value>
    <value name="VALUE-2">
        <block type="Number">
            <field name="NUM">0</field>
        </block>
    </value>
    <value name="VALUE-3">
        <block type="Number">
            <field name="NUM">5</field>
        </block>
    </value>    
</block>

Abort.name: Abort
Abort.title: Abort
examples_xml:
<block type="ruleBlock">
    <mutation isOnGoingEvent="false"></mutation>
    <field name="NAME">New Rule</field>
    <field name="EVENTTYPE">OnPlayerEarnedKill</field>
    <statement name="CONDITIONS"></statement>
    <statement name="ACTIONS">
        <block type="If">
            <mutation></mutation>
            <value name="VALUE-0">
                <block type="Equals">
                    <value name="VALUE-0">
                        <block type="GetTeam">
                            <value name="VALUE-0">
                                <block type="EventPlayer"></block>
                            </value>
                        </block>
                    </value>
                    <value name="VALUE-1">
                        <block type="GetTeam">
                            <value name="VALUE-0">
                                <block type="Number">
                                    <field name="NUM">1</field>
                                </block>
                            </value>
                        </block>
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>
            <statement name="DO">
                <block type="Abort"></block>
            </statement>
        </block>
    </statement>
</block>

ChaseVariableAtRate.name: ChaseVariableAtRate
ChaseVariableAtRate.title: ChaseVariableAtRate
ChaseVariableAtRate.summary_raw:
Gradually modifies the value of a Variable at a specified rate (value/second) until it reaches the provided limit.
Note: If the limit is changed later, the Variable will continue to be updated from its previous value. To spot modifying the Variable, use StopChasingVariable.
ChaseVariableAtRate.summary_known_placeholders_resolved:
Gradually modifies the value of a Variable at a specified rate (value/second) until it reaches the provided limit.
Note: If the limit is changed later, the Variable will continue to be updated from its previous value. To spot modifying the Variable, use StopChasingVariable.
examples_xml:
<block type="ChaseVariableAtRate">
    <value name="VALUE-1">
        <block type="Number">
            <field name="NUM">30</field>
        </block>
    </value>
    <value name="VALUE-2">
        <block type="Number">
            <field name="NUM">1</field>
        </block>
    </value>
</block>

ChaseVariableOverTime.name: ChaseVariableOverTime
ChaseVariableOverTime.title: ChaseVariableOverTime
ChaseVariableOverTime.summary_raw:
Gradually modifies the value of a Variable over time (in seconds). The variable's value will reach the limit at the end of the interval.
Note: If the limit is changed later, the Variable will continue to be updated from its previous value. To spot modifying the Variable, use StopChasingVariable.
ChaseVariableOverTime.summary_known_placeholders_resolved:
Gradually modifies the value of a Variable over time (in seconds). The variable's value will reach the limit at the end of the interval.
Note: If the limit is changed later, the Variable will continue to be updated from its previous value. To spot modifying the Variable, use StopChasingVariable.
examples_xml:
<block type="ChaseVariableOverTime">
    <value name="VALUE-1">
        <block type="Number">
            <field name="NUM">100</field>
        </block>
    </value>
    <value name="VALUE-2">
        <block type="Number">
            <field name="NUM">30</field>
        </block>
    </value>
</block>

FilteredArray.name: FilteredArray
FilteredArray.title: FilteredArray
FilteredArray.summary_raw: Returns a filtered version of the specified Array based on the condition provided. This block cycles through the entire array. You can utilize the CurrentArrayElement block to represent the element in the Array for each iteration. For an Array like AllPlayers, CurrentArrayElement would represent each Player in that Array. You can then build your filter condition based on a property of that Player (like score, or some custom player Variable value).
FilteredArray.summary_known_placeholders_resolved: Returns a filtered version of the specified Array based on the condition provided. This block cycles through the entire array. You can utilize the CurrentArrayElement block to represent the element in the Array for each iteration. For an Array like AllPlayers, CurrentArrayElement would represent each Player in that Array. You can then build your filter condition based on a property of that Player (like score, or some custom player Variable value).
examples_xml:
<block type="FilteredArray">
    <value name="VALUE-0">
        <block type="AllPlayers" />
    </value>
    <value name="VALUE-1">
        <block type="Equals">
            <value name="VALUE-0">
                <block type="GetTeam">
                    <value name="VALUE-0">
                        <block type="CurrentArrayElement" />
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>
            <value name="VALUE-1">
                <block type="GetTeam">
                    <value name="VALUE-0">
                        <block type="Number">
                            <field name="NUM">3</field>
                        </block>
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>
        </block>
    </value>
</block>

examples_xml:
<block type= "ruleBlock">
    <field name= "NAME">TurnTrainAround</field>
    <field name= "EVENTTYPE">OnGolmudTrainStopped</field>
    <statement name= "CONDITIONS">
        <block type="conditionBlock">
            <value name="CONDITION">
                <block type= "Equals">
                    <value name= "VALUE-0">
                        <block type= "EventGolmudTrainStopReason"/>
                    </value>
                    <value name= "VALUE-1">
                        <block type= "GolmudTrainStopReasonItem">
                            <field name= "VALUE-0">GolmudTrainStopReasonItem</field>
                            <field name= "VALUE-1">ReachedEastTerminal</field>                        
                        </block>
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>                   
        </block>
    </statement>    
    <statement name= "ACTIONS">
        <block type= "GolmudTrainSendMoveCommand">
            <value name= "VALUE-0">
                <block type= "GolmudTrainMoveCommandsItem">
                    <field name= "VALUE-0">GolmudTrainMoveCommands</field>
                    <field name= "VALUE-1">MoveWest</field>
                </block>                
            </value>                   
        </block>
    </statement>
</block>

If.name: If
If.title: If
If.summary_raw: A special block which evaluates conditions to control the flow of Actions in the If, Else If, and Else branches.
If.summary_known_placeholders_resolved: A special block which evaluates conditions to control the flow of Actions in the If, Else If, and Else branches.
examples_xml:
<block type="If">
    <mutation elseif="1" else="1"></mutation>
    <value name="VALUE-0">
        <block type="Equals">
            <value name="VALUE-0">
                <block type="GetTeam">
                    <value name="VALUE-0">
                        <block type="EventPlayer"></block>
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>
            <value name="VALUE-1">
                <block type="GetTeam">
                    <value name="VALUE-0">
                        <block type="Number">
                            <field name="NUM">1</field>
                        </block>
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>
        </block>
    </value>
    <statement name="DO"></statement>
    <value name="IF1">
        <block type="Equals">
            <value name="VALUE-0">
                <block type="GetTeam">
                    <value name="VALUE-0">
                        <block type="EventPlayer"></block>
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>
            <value name="VALUE-1">
                <block type="GetTeam">
                    <value name="VALUE-0">
                        <block type="Number">
                            <field name="NUM">2</field>
                        </block>
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>
        </block>
    </value>
    <statement name="DO1"></statement>
    <statement name="ELSE"></statement>
</block>

SendPortalLogToAdmin.name: SendPortalLogToAdmin
SendPortalLogToAdmin.title: SendPortalLogToAdmin
SendPortalLogToAdmin.summary_raw: Sends Portal Log to the admin client of the current session when hosting via "Host" (Dedicated Server). For "Host Locally," Portal Log is always available locally, so this will do nothing. Writes to PortalLog.txt on the admin's client. If admin doesn't exist, this will do nothing. Quota applies for valid log sends per session.
SendPortalLogToAdmin.summary_known_placeholders_resolved: Sends Portal Log to the admin client of the current session when hosting via "Host" (Dedicated Server). For "Host Locally," Portal Log is always available locally, so this will do nothing. Writes to PortalLog.txt on the admin's client. If admin doesn't exist, this will do nothing. Quota applies for valid log sends per session.
examples_xml:
<block type="SendPortalLogToAdmin">
</block>

SortedArray.name: SortedArray
SortedArray.title: SortedArray
SortedArray.summary_raw: Returns a sorted version of the specified Array given a Number value to sort by (ascending). CurrentArrayElement can be utilized to represent each value in the Array. In the following example, CurrentArrayElement is used to represent each Player in AllPlayers. GetGameModeScore is used with CurrentArrayElement to return the score, used as a rank, to sort the Array in ascending order.
SortedArray.summary_known_placeholders_resolved: Returns a sorted version of the specified Array given a Number value to sort by (ascending). CurrentArrayElement can be utilized to represent each value in the Array. In the following example, CurrentArrayElement is used to represent each Player in AllPlayers. GetGameModeScore is used with CurrentArrayElement to return the score, used as a rank, to sort the Array in ascending order.
examples_xml:
<block type= "SortedArray">
    <value name= "VALUE-0">
        <block type= "AllPlayers"/>
    </value>
    <value name= "VALUE-1">
        <block type= "GetGameModeScore">
            <value name= "VALUE-0">
                <block type= "CurrentArrayElement"/>
            </value>
        </block>
    </value>
</block>

</block>

conditionBlock.name: conditionBlock
conditionBlock.title: %{PYRITE_CONDITION}
examples_xml:
<block type="ruleBlock">
    <mutation isOnGoingEvent="false"></mutation>
    <field name="NAME">New Rule</field>
    <field name="EVENTTYPE">OnPlayerEarnedKill</field>
    <statement name="CONDITIONS">
        <block type="conditionBlock">
            <value name="CONDITION">
                <block type="Equals">
                    <value name="VALUE-0">
                        <block type="GetTeam">
                            <value name="VALUE-0">
                                <block type="EventPlayer"></block>
                            </value>
                        </block>
                    </value>
                    <value name="VALUE-1">
                        <block type="GetTeam">
                            <value name="VALUE-0">
                                <block type="Number">
                                    <field name="NUM">1</field>
                                </block>
                            </value>
                        </block>
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>
        </block>
    </statement>
    <statement name="ACTIONS">
        <block type="SetGameModeScore">
            <value name="VALUE-0">
                <block type="EventPlayer"></block>
            </value>
            <value name="VALUE-1">
                <block type="Add">
                    <value name="VALUE-0">
                        <block type="GetGameModeScore">
                            <value name="VALUE-0">
                                <block type="EventPlayer"></block>
                            </value>
                        </block>
                    </value>
                    <value name="VALUE-1">
                        <block type="Number">
                            <field name="NUM">1</field>
                        </block>
                    </value>
                </block>
            </value>
        </block>
    </statement>
</block>

            </value>
        </block>
    </statement>
</block>
